description_long: A young adult male is depicted standing upright, wearing a sleeveless tank top and loose-fitting jeans secured with a belt. His build is athletic, with defined arms and a straight posture. The jeans are slightly baggy and cover the tops of his sturdy, casual shoes. His facial features are sharp, and his hair is closely cropped in a short, neat style. The overall appearance suggests a casual, urban look suitable for everyday street environments. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and his hands are relaxed at his sides.
description: A casually dressed adult male stands upright in a tank top and loose jeans, with short hair and casual shoes, exuding an urban street style.
description_view_0: Front view shows the man's face, tank top, belt, and relaxed arms at his sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of his face, arm, and the loose fit of his jeans.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of his tank top, jeans, and closely cropped hair.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile and relaxed posture.
attribute_clothing_type: casual tank top and loose jeans with a belt
